description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, featuring a flat roof and a spacious open-plan layout. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a carport and a main entrance, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a low fence and bordered by mature trees and shrubs, offering privacy and greenery. Outdoor amenities include a patio area, a small pool or hot tub, and a separate garage or storage structure. The rear and side yards are landscaped with grass and garden beds, while paved walkways connect different areas of the property. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a driveway, carport, and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, additional parking, and more secluded garden areas with trees.
description_view_2: Side view with dense foliage partially obscuring the bungalow, revealing the flat roof and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Back angled view displaying the patio, pool or hot tub, and the integration of the house with the garden and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
